purchaseNotice.title: Purchase notice
purchaseNotice.intro: Thank you for shopping with CC Japan Anime Proxy. Please read these purchase notes before ordering; placing an order means you agree to them.

sections.heading: 1. Product nature & pre-orders
items: Most items are Japan proxy/pre-order goods, ordered from suppliers after you place your order rather than kept in stock.
Pre-order arrival times follow the supplier's shipping schedule and may change; an exact arrival date cannot be guaranteed.
Product photos and colors may vary slightly from the actual item shipped by the manufacturer.

sections.heading: 2. Ordering & order confirmation
items: After checkout, orders are split automatically by activity — one order per activity.
Submitting an order is a successful reservation; whether it proceeds depends on each activity's deadline and group status.
You may add more items before an activity ends; after it ends you can only browse.

sections.heading: 3. Payment
items: After an order is confirmed, please pay via the method and within the deadline stated by customer service or the confirmation message.
Orders left unpaid past the deadline may be canceled at our discretion.

sections.heading: 4. Shipping & delivery
items: Items are first consolidated from Japan to Taiwan, then shipped by your chosen method (home delivery / convenience-store pickup).
Shipping time is separate from the pre-order wait and may be delayed by customs, weather, or logistics volume.

sections.heading: 5. Cancellation, returns & out-of-stock
items: Once ordered from Japan, pre-order items generally cannot be canceled or returned without cause.
If an item arrives defective or incorrect, contact customer service as soon as possible and keep the packaging and receipt.
If goods are unavailable in Japan or an activity does not reach its group target, the affected item will be refunded.

sections.heading: 6. Other
items: For anything not covered here, each activity's announcement and customer service notes prevail.
For any questions, reach us via the "Contact us" links in the footer.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: CC Japan Anime Proxy (the "Platform") values your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.

sections.heading: 1. Data we collect
items: Account data: user ID, display name, and avatar obtained via LINE login.
Member data: name, email, phone, and delivery address you provide.
Transaction data: cart contents, order details, and payment status.
Usage data: necessary technical information such as device and browser type.

sections.heading: 2. How we use data
items: To handle LINE login, identity verification, and member services.
To create and process orders, arrange consolidation and shipping, and provide support and order notifications.
To maintain platform security and improve our service quality and experience.

sections.heading: 3. Sharing & disclosure
items: We do not sell your personal data.
We share data only as needed to complete proxy purchasing and shipping, or as required by law, with partner logistics/payment providers or authorities.

sections.heading: 4. Cookies & local storage
items: We use necessary local storage (e.g., localStorage) on your device to keep your login and cart.
You may clear it in your browser, but you may need to log in again or lose your cart contents.

sections.heading: 5. Retention & security
items: We retain your data only as long as necessary for the purposes above, and apply reasonable technical and organizational safeguards.

sections.heading: 6. Your rights
items: You may access, correct, or delete your personal data, or ask us to stop certain uses.
To exercise these rights or for any privacy question, reach us via the "Contact us" links in the footer.

sections.heading: 7. Policy updates
items: Any changes to this policy will be posted on this page; please review it periodically.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.intro: Welcome to CC Japan Anime Proxy. By logging in and using the Platform, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to the following Terms of Service.

sections.heading: 1. Services
items: The Platform offers proxy/pre-order purchasing of Japanese anime goods, plus cart, checkout, and order tracking.
We may add, change, or suspend parts of the service at any time without individual notice.

sections.heading: 2. Account & login
items: Using the Platform requires logging in with LINE and adding our official account as a friend.
You are responsible for safeguarding your account and for all activity under it.

sections.heading: 3. Orders
items: Orders are split by activity; confirmation depends on each activity's deadline and group status.
Ensure your delivery and contact details are correct; you are responsible for failures caused by incorrect information.

sections.heading: 4. Pricing & payment
items: Prices, shipping, and related fees follow the activity page and checkout information at the time of ordering.
Please pay within the stated deadline, or we may cancel the order.

sections.heading: 5. User conduct
items: Do not use the Platform for illegal, fraudulent, disruptive, or rights-infringing activity.
We may suspend or terminate access for violations.

sections.heading: 6. Intellectual property
items: Trademarks, text, images, and UI design on the Platform are protected by law and may not be reproduced or used without authorization.

sections.heading: 7. Limitation of liability
items: To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for delays or losses caused by events beyond our control (e.g., Japan stock shortages, ungrouped activities, international shipping delays, or force majeure).

sections.heading: 8. Changes & governing law
items: These terms may be updated and posted on this page; continued use means acceptance of the updated terms.
These terms are governed by the laws of Taiwan (R.O.C.).

userGuide.title: User guide
userGuide.intro: New to CC Japan Anime Proxy? Follow these steps to go from login to checkout with ease.

sections.heading: Step 1: Log in & add friend
items: Log in with LINE and add our official account as a friend to enter the shop.

sections.heading: Step 2: Browse activities & products
items: The home page shows popular, latest, and ending-soon activities; you can also browse by series.
Tap an activity to see its purchasable products.

sections.heading: Step 3: Add to cart
items: Tap "Add to cart" on a product to choose quantity and add notes (e.g., character or variant).
You can add products across different activities.

sections.heading: Step 4: Checkout & shipping
items: In the cart, tap "Go to checkout", then choose a shipping method (home delivery / store pickup) and address.
Orders are split automatically by activity — one order per activity.

sections.heading: Step 5: Complete payment
items: After your order is confirmed, pay via the method and deadline in the confirmation message or from customer service.

sections.heading: Step 6: Track orders & delivery
items: Check order status and progress anytime under "Orders".
Pre-order items are consolidated from Japan to Taiwan before shipping — please be patient.

sections.heading: Need help?
items: For any questions, reach us via the "Contact us" links in the footer.
